blocks.text: This report summarizes the **key performance indicators** across all business units for the *fourth quarter* of fiscal year 2025. Overall revenue grew by **23% year-over-year**, driven primarily by expansion in the __Asia Pacific__ region and strong adoption of our *enterprise product tier*.

blocks.headers: Region, Q3 Revenue, Q4 Revenue, Growth, Notes
blocks.rows:
North America (United States and Canada), $12.4M, $14.1M, +13.7%, Strong enterprise adoption driven by new product launches
Europe & United Kingdom, $8.7M, $10.2M, +17.2%, GDPR compliance improvements boosted customer confidence significantly
Asia Pacific (Japan and Southeast Asia), $5.1M, $7.8M, +52.9%, Fastest growing region with major wins in financial services sector
Latin America, $2.3M, $2.9M, +26.1%, New partnerships with local distributors in Brazil and Mexico
Middle East & Africa, $1.1M, $1.5M, +36.4%, Early stage but promising pipeline in UAE and South Africa

blocks.text:
Enterprise tier adoption increased by 45% quarter-over-quarter, with 127 new enterprise accounts onboarded. Customer retention rate remained strong at 94.2%, up from 91.8% in Q3. The average deal size grew from $48K to $62K, reflecting successful upsell initiatives.

Product development velocity improved with 3 major feature releases shipped on schedule. Infrastructure costs were reduced by 18% through optimization efforts, improving gross margins from 71% to 74%.

blocks.items: Total Revenue: $36.5M, Growth: +23% YoY, Customers: 2847, NPS: 72

blocks.text: Based on current pipeline analysis and contracted revenue, we project Q1 2026 revenue between $38M and $41M.

blocks.items:
Launch of AI-powered analytics module with predictive insights
Expansion into Southeast Asian market starting with Singapore and Indonesia
Rollout of partner certification program with 50 target partners
Migration of legacy customers to the new enterprise tier

blocks.text: This quarter represents a turning point for the company. We are transitioning from regional growth to a truly global presence, with infrastructure and partnerships to support scale.

blocks.items:
Potential regulatory changes in the EU data privacy landscape may require compliance updates
Currency headwinds in emerging markets could impact reported revenue by 2-3%
Competitor product launch expected in Q2 may affect win rates in mid-market segment
Key engineering hires still needed for the AI module delivery timeline
